name: cloversec-ctf-forexample
description: CloverSec CTF collection, conversion, platform Docker delivery, writeup, archive, review, and Hub submission workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: CTF 收集、构建、手册、归档和 Hub 提交流程
interface.longDescription: CloverSec CTF For Example packages Codex skills for workflow task intake, contest research, challenge resource classification, container inference, Docker validation, asset collection, platform Docker delivery, writeup drafting, archive packaging, quality review, Hub submission preparation, post-review retagging, and final reporting. Existing upstream Dockerfile or compose files are treated as evidence and migration inputs; container challenges must still pass through cloversec-ctf-build-dockerizer before they can be considered CloverSec platform deliverables. Version 0.3.5 adds a Dockerizer confirmation gate: unconfirmed container/source cases are marked as pending, batch reports block archive readiness, and failure_cases.jsonl records platform_conversion_required. Internal xlsx and Yuque outputs must keep the complete Flag field.
defaultPrompt: 完整 Flag 必须写入 xlsx/语雀字段；公开报告只写状态和 hash。
Hub 只生成草稿、上传清单、浏览器计划和审核状态；不自动最终提交。
Dockerfile/compose 只作迁移输入；未确认时写 confirmation_action=dockerizer、failure_category=platform_conversion_required。
